response.justification: Szabo exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with ~18 years of software engineering across web, cloud, and infrastructure domains. He demonstrates entrepreneurial drive (GISCollective founder) and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. However, the role targets a principal engineer specializing in AI strategy, and his background shows breadth rather than recognized expertise in AI/ML. No advanced degree in AI, no demonstrated AI-powered products, and no clear track record of leading AI adoption initiatives or advising customers on AI strategy—the core responsibilities of this position.
strengths: Exceeds minimum experience requirement with ~18 years across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure); recent staff-level role at re:cinq touching AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks

Proven entrepreneurial and leadership capability: founded and operates GISCollective for 10 years (open-source platform used by Green Map), organized technical workshops, mentored others, set up CI/CD infrastructure

Deep technical execution across full stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) with demonstrated ability to scale systems handling millions of requests; aligns with 'builder and code fluency' preference
concerns: AI specialization gap: recent work is AI infrastructure/tooling, not AI product strategy or recognized AI expertise; no demonstrated products with AI, no AI/ML portfolio, and no evidence of advising customers on AI adoption—all key responsibilities
Missing preferred qualification of Master's/PhD in AI-related field; formal AI/ML education would strengthen credibility for an AI strategy role

Career pattern shows technical breadth and frequent role changes (1–3 years per position) rather than sustained focus on AI/ML specialization; no clear narrative around deep AI domain expertise or strategic AI initiatives

key_factors.factor: Meets minimum experience threshold with recent cloud/infrastructure exposure
